title: Cybersecurity Risk Management
description: Tools and frameworks for identifying, assessing, and managing cybersecurity and operational risks

resources.title: Cyber Risk Quantification Guide
resources.description: Introduction to cyber risk quantification methodologies including FAIR (Factor Analysis of Information Risk) with worked examples.

resources.title: Third-Party / Vendor Risk Management Playbook
resources.description: End-to-end vendor risk management playbook from initial onboarding due diligence through ongoing monitoring and offboarding procedures.

resources.title: Enterprise Risk Register Template
resources.description: Excel-based enterprise risk register with built-in risk scoring matrix, heat map visualization, and board-level reporting dashboard.

resources.title: Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery Framework
resources.description: BC/DR framework aligned with ISO 22301, including BIA template, recovery strategy development, and exercise planning guide.

resources.title: Executive Cyber Risk Dashboard & Reporting Kit
resources.description: Board and C-suite ready cyber risk reporting kit with KRI/KPI definitions, scorecard templates, and narrative reporting guidance.
